name: Sos in Red Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground chuck in a skillet. Drain excess fat.
2. Add chopped onions and chopped green peppers to the skillet. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in minced garlic and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Pour in tomato sauce and stir to combine. Add sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Simmer the mixture on low heat for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot over toast, rolls, or muffins.
